title: Ubiquiti G6 Pro Dome - 8MP IP Camera, White
category: Ubiquiti / Cameras, security / IP cameras / Dome
description: Notice: For this product, we provide individual project-based pricing depending on the configuration, scope, and conditions of the project. For more information, please contact your sales representative Ubiquiti G6 Pro Dome features an 8MP sensor (3840 x 2160px) at 30 fps, a varifocal lens (2.36x optical zoom), and adaptive IR illumination for night vision up to 40 meters. The camera has a durable housing made of aluminum and polycarbonate, with IP66 protection against dust and powerful water jets. It connects to the network via Gigabit LAN with PoE+ support and a maximum power consumption of 15W 4K (8MP), 30 FPS video (3840 x 2160px) Advanced AI detection of various objects and events Night mode with IR LEDs and IR cut filter IP66 weather-resistant housing IK10 tamper resistance Power via PoE+ (42,5 to 57V DC) Managed through UniFi Protect software Built-in microphone White color Device Screws, wall plugs, tools Wall/ceiling mount
